vids.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has labelled Kai Havertz's winner against his former club Chelsea as a "special moment."
vids.headline: Mikel Arteta: Today was a special moment for Kai Havertz

vids.description: Steve Nicol can't work out why Chelsea's Liam Rosenior left it so late to chase the game against Arsenal, despite trailing from the first leg of their Carabao Cup semifinal.
vids.headline: Nicol confused by Rosenior's approach in Chelsea's defeat to Arsenal

track.trackName: COM_SOC Analysis (Nicol confused by Rosenior’s approach in Chelsea’s defeat to Arsenal) 2026/02/03

vids.description: Liam Rosenior has revealed his disappointment at Chelsea's 1-0 defeat to Arsenal in the second leg of the Carabao Cup semi-final.
vids.title: Liam Rosenior: I'm disappointed we didn't make it through to the final

gmStry.hdln: Arsenal see off Chelsea to reach Carabao Cup final
gmStry.desc: Arsenal reached their first major final in six years after a 1-0 win over Chelsea at the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday saw them progress to the final of the Carabao Cup 4-2 on aggregate.

allCommentary.dtls: Goal! Arsenal 1, Chelsea 0. Kai Havertz (Arsenal) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Declan Rice following a fast break.
